protocols.name: CRITICAL_ERROR
protocols.trigger: Critical error, logic failure, or data inconsistency in any domain
protocols.action: Mandatory rollback to Planning Layer. All downstream production in affected domain suspended.
steps: Audit Agent flags with domain + context reference
Immediate thread suspension in affected domain
Root Cause Analysis filed within 4 hours
Correction session with domain-specific agents
Re-audit before resumption
protocols.escalation: 3x RED-1 in one domain = mandatory Structural Review

protocols.name: COMPLIANCE_RISK
protocols.trigger: Legal, financial, or compliance risk in any domain
protocols.action: Immediate production halt. Compliance Agent notified. All flagged outputs sequestered.
steps: Compliance Agent issues flag with source reference
No further distribution of flagged output
Risk assessment within 2 hours
Remediation brief issued to responsible agent
Two independent audit passes before clearance

protocols.name: QUALITY_FAILURE
protocols.action: Return to Execution Design Layer. QA Agent issues remediation brief.
steps: QA Agent documents specific failure criteria
Affected output rejected — not revised in place
Return to Layer 4 with remediation brief
Resubmission undergoes full Layer 5 validation
protocols.escalation: 2x GOLD-1 on same output = Planning Layer review

protocols.name: SYSTEM_HALT
protocols.trigger: Simultaneous RED-1 + BLUE-1, or Constitutional Violation
protocols.action: Full system halt. All production across ALL domains ceases. Constitutional Triumvirate convenes within 24 hours.
steps: All agents notified immediately
Triumvirate convenes within 24 hours
Full Pipeline Integrity Audit across all domains
Written Recovery Plan required before resumption
Gatekeeper must personally approve recovery plan

protocols.name: ADHD_OVERWHELM
protocols.trigger: ADHD overwhelm detected — task queue overload, decision paralysis, or executive dysfunction indicators
protocols.action: Automatic task triage. Reduce visible queue to single next action. Defer all non-critical decisions.
steps: Executive Function Agent triggers immediately
All domains except current priority are paused
Task queue reduced to maximum 3 visible items
Single Next Action surfaced with clear instructions
Dopamine-reward task interspersed if available
Duration: until Gatekeeper signals recovery

protocols.name: FLOW_PROTECTION
protocols.trigger: Flow state / momentum detected — Gatekeeper is producing at high velocity
protocols.action: Protect flow state. All non-emergency notifications deferred.
steps: Executive Function Agent activates shield
All lower-priority interrupts queued silently
Cross-domain task requests held until flow ends
Session duration logged for pattern analysis
Natural break point suggested at 90-min intervals

protocols.name: RESOURCE_CONFLICT
protocols.trigger: Cross-domain resource conflict — two or more domains competing for Gatekeeper attention/time
protocols.action: Boardroom arbitration required. Northern Star priority order governs.
steps: Competing domain directors present cases
Board votes on priority allocation
Northern Star priority order is the tiebreaker
Decision logged with reasoning
Losing domain receives rescheduled timeline
